sprint: RC4 Sprint 11C - Semantic Field Failure Analysis

artificial_or_generic_fields.cause: mostly the literal token 'olay' for every event
artificial_or_generic_fields.effect: mostly the literal token 'durum değişimi' for every event

sample_event_quality_comments.comment: actors present, action is garbled (OCR noise); object/goal/location empty; cause/effect generic 'olay'/'durum değişimi' -> low specificity.
actor ok, action noisy; no object/goal/location; cause/effect generic.
duplicate-like action text; no object/goal/location; cause/effect generic.
actor extracted but action truncated; empty object/goal/location; cause/effect generic.
same pattern as above; evidence appears short; fields missing.
two actors detected; still no object/goal/location; cause/effect generic; suggests argument extraction not implemented.
actors ok; action short; semantic arguments missing; cause/effect default.
action contains longer phrase but object/goal/location still empty; cause/effect generic.
actor ok; no location/object/goal; default cause/effect.
actor partial; heavy OCR tokenization; semantic fields missing.

Tavşan Pati.root_cause: Input evidence appears short and/or OCR-corrupted; heuristics default to generic 'cause'/'effect' when they do not detect explicit causal language; object/goal/location extraction rules are too narrow or absent for Turkish and noisy tokens.
recommended_fixes: Add OCR/text-cleaning + normalization before extraction (remove garbled tokens).
Broaden goal/object/location extraction: use Turkish morphological clues (case suffixes), postpositions, and common patterns (için, -mek üzere, hedef, amaç, -i/-ı as direct objects).
Implement a conservative defaulting policy: do NOT fill 'cause'/'effect' with generic labels unless causal connectives (çünkü,dolayı,sonuç olarak,bunun sonucu) or effect verbs are detected.
Add lightweight NER or gazetteer lookup for locations to increase `location` recall.
Log and surface examples of low-confidence events for manual review (for iterative rule improvement).

sample_event_quality_comments.comment: actors OK; repeated sentence 'yaparsak mutlaka bir çare buluruz' used many times -> evidence duplication or coarse sentence grouping; object/goal empty.
actors present; result populated but object empty; cause/effect generic.
inciting incident label with resolved state suggests heuristic mismatch; semantic args missing.
duplicate-like action; no object/goal/location.
same action repeated; suggests dedup step needed.
same pattern; lack of object extraction.
same action phrase; location empty.
actor list noisy (many tokens treated as actors); NER/actor-cleaning needed; object empty.
conflict=true detected correctly but object/goal/location empty; cause/effect generic.
conflict flagged but semantic args missing.

Büyülü Yastıklar.root_cause: Evidence grouping and actor/entity extraction are noisy; heuristics create duplicate events from repeated sentences; object/location patterns absent; cause/effect defaulting masks real causal signal.
recommended_fixes: Add deduplication of identical/similar evidence texts before reconstruction.
Improve actor extraction to filter short/noisy tokens and normalize named entities.
Add object extraction rules using Turkish case markers and noun phrase chunking; consider a shallow dependency parser (spaCy with tr models or Zemberek integration).
Constrain cause/effect filling to explicit causal constructions; attach confidence scores rather than binary fill flags.

empty_fields: object (majority), location (majority), some goals still missing

artificial_or_generic_fields.cause: often 'olay' but some specific causes (e.g., 'hedefe yaklaşma','moral kaybı') are detected
artificial_or_generic_fields.effect: mixed: many generic 'durum değişimi' but some specific effects present

sample_event_quality_comments.comment: actor 'Burası' (likely OCR); action 'geldiğimizi düşündüm' — no object/goal/location; cause generic.
goal 'yardım' correctly detected; cause/effect specific strings present -> heuristic can succeed when phrasing explicit.
actor ok; location missing though topic suggests place; cause generic.
object 'Karaya' and goal 'karaya ulaşma' extracted — good example of successful argument extraction.
short action; missing object/goal; cause generic.
location 'Hindistan' detected — shows NER-like matching works for known place names.
actors noisy; action complex; no object/goal extracted; cause generic.
goal 'batıya yolculuk' detected — good pattern match for purpose/goal clauses.
goal 'karşılaşma' present and conflict true — successful extraction in some cases.
goal 'yardım' detected; cause/effect are more meaningful here (moral kaybı etc.).

most_frequent_failures: location (when not a known place name)
Benim Adım Kristof Kolomb.root_cause: Heuristics partially tuned for biography-style texts allow some goal detection in explicit phrasing, but argument extraction remains surface-level and fails on varied phrasing; cause/effect fallback still too permissive.
recommended_fixes: Preserve and reuse heuristics that worked here (named-place matching) and expand with a place-name list and morphological checks.
Add a noun-chunker or light dependency parse to reliably extract objects and locations from verb arguments.
Introduce confidence scoring for each semantic field; suppress generic placeholders below a confidence threshold.
Adjust narrative function heuristics: include features from sentence position, connective words, and event consequence verbs to separate rising action from inciting/resolution more evenly.

conclusions: Primary missing fields: object, location, goal — caused by narrow or absent extraction rules and noisy OCR/evidence.
Cause/effect appear saturated due to a permissive defaulting rule; they must be made conditional and scored.
Narrative function skew arises from coarse rule thresholds and evidence-position heuristics; needs richer features.
next_engineering_steps: Add preprocessing: OCR cleanup + sentence normalization.
Implement conservative defaulting for cause/effect and add confidence scores.
Integrate a Turkish-capable NLP stack (spaCy tr or Zemberek) for noun-chunking/NER/morphology.
Add deduplication and evidence grouping to avoid repeated identical events.
Create a small human-reviewed seed set (50–100 events) to craft and validate improved rules and thresholds.
